headline: OpenAI trial exposes leadership credibility questions amid drug advice liability claims
body: Sam Altman faced testimony challenging his truthfulness during OpenAI litigation, while the company simultaneously confronts a lawsuit over ChatGPT providing dangerous drug advice. These parallel challenges threaten OpenAI's standing as healthcare AI systems increasingly integrate into clinical workflows and patient-facing applications. Healthcare systems evaluating OpenAI's models for EHR integration, clinical decision support, or patient communication must now factor organizational governance credibility into vendor due diligence. The liability exposure around medical advice adds another layer of risk assessment that health IT leaders cannot ignore when adopting large language models at scale.
